flags.message: The provisioned petition PDF is a scanned filing with no text layer (documents.json marks it empty_text: true), so the questions presented could not be read. The prediction rests on the docket record, lower-court posture, and base rates; every structural signal points the same way, so the gap is unlikely to matter here. Secondary note: the CourtListener opinion record for the decision under review (opinion id 10729215, Ga. Ct. App. A25D0341) carries mismatched text from an unrelated S.D. W. Va. order, so the lower-court ruling text was unavailable from that source too.
